productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Drift Cat 3 CF SF Casual Shoes
description: Round toed, black casual shoes with red accents, low top styling and a Velcro closure Synthetic upper with stitched overlays, Formstrip on one side, multiple branding, has Italian flag and Ferrari shield deatils, midfoot strap with Velcro closure, panelling along the mouth, and reinforced heel collarSoft tongue and inner with branding on the tongueCushioned footbed with branding at the heel, has ecoOrthoLite sockliner Tough rubber outsole with textured grooves, outsole extends on to the backfoot Warranty: 3 months for manufacturing defect onlyWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
